findings.title: Missing snapshot identity in snapshot contract

evidence.text: - each opponent output must reference `introspect.skills.snapshot` by `snapshot_id`

findings.impact: Findings cannot be reliably correlated to a specific snapshot across runs.
findings.required_change: Add a stable `snapshot_id` field to the snapshot contract and emitted introspection artifact.

findings.title: Inconsistent status/gate enums across contract sections
findings.impact: Machine consumers need ad-hoc enum mapping and can mis-handle gate outcomes.
findings.required_change: Adopt one canonical tri-state enum set and apply it consistently.

findings.title: Mutation ownership boundary is contradictory

evidence.text: `homeostasis` should treat todo management as a dedicated writer capability (`todo-write` or equivalent), with:

findings.impact: Implementation ownership is ambiguous and can bypass governance by enabling direct mutation.
findings.required_change: Either remove `todo-write` from homeostasis or explicitly revise the boundary model and controls.

findings.title: Deterministic/read-only claim lacks enforceable tool constraints

evidence.text: Bind `opponent_validate` to deterministic tooling so findings are reproducible:
All tool-bound runs stay read-only; remediation remains downstream.

findings.impact: Runs can be non-reproducible or write local state unless determinism and read-only execution flags are defined.
findings.required_change: Specify fixed seeds, disabled/randomized-state controls, cache/tmp handling, and filesystem write restrictions in contract.
